---
pagetitle: "Xorq documentation"
description: "Official Xorq documentation. Learn how to build portable, multi-engine ML pipelines with deferred execution, caching, lineage tracking, and deployment-ready artifacts."
toc: false
page-layout: custom
classes: homepage
listing:
  - id: centerpiece-cards
    template: "style/gallery.ejs"
    contents:
      - "tutorials/core_tutorials/build_a_semantic_catalog.qmd"
      - "tutorials/core_tutorials/working_with_the_catalog.qmd"
      - "getting_started/get-started-with-xorq-init.qmd"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    fields: [title, description]
  - id: featured-ml-card
    template: "style/gallery.ejs"
    contents:
      - "tutorials/ml_tutorials/train_your_first_model.qmd"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 1
    fields: [title, description]
---

::: {.hero-section}
::: {.hero-content}
# The context engine for data agents — start here.

Build, version, and serve composable data expressions. Three tutorials, end-to-end. Pick where to start.

[BROWSE TUTORIALS ↓](#centerpieces){.hero-btn .hero-btn-primary}
[VIEW ON GITHUB](https://github.com/xorq-labs/xorq){.hero-btn .hero-btn-secondary}
:::
:::

::: {.content-section}

## <i class="bi bi-rocket-takeoff"></i> Tutorials {#centerpieces}

Three end-to-end walkthroughs. Pick the one closest to what you're building.

:::{#centerpiece-cards}
:::

## <i class="bi bi-chat-square-text"></i> Drive xorq from Claude

The Claude plugin exposes xorq's CLI as slash commands inside Claude Code --- scaffold, build, catalog, and serve a real pipeline without leaving the chat.

```bash
$ pip install xorq

$ claude
> /plugin marketplace add xorq-labs/claude-plugins
> /plugin install xorq@xorq-plugins
> /exit
```

Restart Claude so the new slash commands register, then drive xorq from the chat:

```bash
$ claude
> /xorq:init
```

## <i class="bi bi-cpu"></i> Start your ML journey

Train your first classifier with Xorq's deferred execution and scikit-learn pipeline wrapping.

:::{#featured-ml-card}
:::

## <i class="bi bi-grid-3x3"></i> Explore the docs

::: {.docs-grid}
::: {.doc-card}
<i class="bi bi-lightbulb"></i>

[**Concepts**](concepts/understanding_xorq/why_deferred_execution.qmd)

Deep dives into deferred execution, caching, and architecture
:::

::: {.doc-card}
<i class="bi bi-terminal"></i>

[**CLI reference**](api_reference/cli/)

Every command you need to build, run, and serve pipelines
:::

::: {.doc-card}
<i class="bi bi-code-square"></i>

[**Python API**](reference/)

Full reference for Xorq's Python API
:::
:::
